teaching

Academic Year: 2022/2023

Instructor:

  • STAT 200 - Elementary Statistics for Applications
    • Winter Term 1: Section 103
  • DSCI 100 - Introduction to Data Science
    • Winter Term 2: Section 005
  • STAT 450 - Case Studies in Statistics
    • Winter Term 2: Section 201 (Co-taught with Prof. Melissa Lee and Prof. Keegan Korthauer)

Academic Year: 2021/2022

Instructor:

  • STAT 200 - Elementary Statistics for Applications
    • Winter Term 1: Section 103
  • STAT 301 - Stochastic Signals and Systems
    • Winter Term 1: Section 101 (Co-taught with Prof. Gabriela Cohen Freue)
  • DSCI 100 - Introduction to Data Science
    • Winter Term 2: Section 005
  • STAT 450 - Case Studies in Statistics
    • Winter Term 2: Section 201 (Co-taught with Prof. Melissa Lee and Prof. Nancy Heckman)

Academic Year: 2020/2021

Instructor

  • STAT 200 - Elementary Statistics for Applications
    • Winter Term 1: Section 103
    • Winter Term 2: Section 202

  • STAT 321 - Stochastic Signals and Systems
    • Winter Term 1: Section 101 (Co-taught with Prof. Lele Wang)

  • STAT 201 - Statistical Inference for Data Science
    • Winter Term 2: Section 201 (Co-taught with Prof. Vincenzo Coia)
    • Summer Term 2: Section 202

Mentoring

  • DSCI 591 - Capstone Project

  • DSCI 563 - Unsupervised Learning

Lab Instructor

  • DSCI 525 - Web and Cloud Computing

Mentoring

  • DSCI 591 - Capstone Project
